TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kinyawpan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 245 buwan, 667 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 411 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 256 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 58%, Cou 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli1 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kinyawpan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kinyawpan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kinyawpan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kinyawpan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Kinyawpan hya' ga Yubang. tay mkyahu' na Kinyawpan hya' ga Triqan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kinjawpan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli* *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa juβaŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa triqan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kinyawpan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 245 buwan, 667 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 411 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 256 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 58%, Cou 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli1 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kinyawpan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kinyawpan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kinyawpan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kinyawpan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Kinyawpan hya' ga Yubang. tay mkyahu' na Kinyawpan hya' ga Triqan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kinjawpan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli* *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa juβaŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinjawpan ħjaʔ ɣa triqan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
